recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Alice Creed
recommendations.overview: A rich man's daughter is held captive in an abandoned apartment by two former convicts who abducted her and hold her ransom in exchange for her father's money.

recommendations.title: The Human Race
recommendations.overview: A cancer survivor, an amputee, several immigrants, and many others are snatched from a Los Angeles street and forced to take part in a deadly race.

recommendations.title: Kill
recommendations.overview: When an army commando finds out his true love is engaged against her will, he boards a New Dehli-bound train in a daring quest to derail the arranged marriage. But when a gang of knife-wielding thieves begin to terrorize innocent passengers on his tr

recommendations.title: Squid Game: Fireplace
recommendations.overview: Come share a toast in the Front Man's lair — but tread carefully, for you’re playing with fire.

recommendations.title: The Clearing
recommendations.overview: When affluent executive Wayne Hayes is kidnapped by a disgruntled employee and held for ransom in a forest, Wayne’s wife is forced to reckon with the FBI agents as they negotiate with the kidnapper.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: The Ambulance
recommendations.overview: When the woman of his dreams is snatched by a strange ambulance, a young man risks it all to find her and tracks down a trafficking ring.

recommendations.title: Curtains
recommendations.overview: Six young actresses auditioning for a movie role at a remote mansion are targeted by a mysterious masked murderer.

recommendations.title: Highway
recommendations.overview: Right before her wedding, a young woman finds herself abducted and held for ransom. As the initial days pass, she begins to develop a strange bond with her kidnapper.

recommendations.title: Guinea Pig: Devil's Experiment
recommendations.overview: Masked thugs torture an innocent woman in increasingly brutal ways.
